description: P99 response latency exceeded 500ms threshold. Current value: 3241ms on /checkout endpoint.
Database connection pool exhausted. Available: 10/10 (pool size reduced from 20 to 10 in v1.8.3 deployment). Requests queuing.
HTTP 5xx error rate exceeded 5% threshold. Current: 38.2%. Majority are 504 Gateway Timeout from DB queries.
Checkout completion rate dropped to 61%. Normal baseline is 97%. Active revenue impact estimated at $4,200/min.
Circuit breaker for payment-processor gateway opened. Failure rate exceeded 50% over 60s window. Fallback activated.
Redis cache hit ratio for session validation dropped from 94% to 67%. Increased load on auth DB.
